article.title: Petros Gaitanos
article.content: Petros Gaitanos', Drama, Yunanistan'da doğdu. Yunan besteci ve şarkıcıdır. == Albümleri == Introduction(Yunanca:Εισαγωγή)1:54 Wrong Season(Yunanca:Λάθος εποχή) 4:22 How I love you(Yunanca:Πως σ' αγαπάω) 4:04 The dilemma(Yunanca:Το δίλημμα) 4:10 I've told you(Yunanca:Σου το 'χω πει ) 2:52 I still ask for you(Yunanca:Και σε ζητάω ακόμα) 4:01 What you are(Yunanca:Αυτό που είσαι ) 3:27 The court of justice(Yunanca:Το δικαστήριο) 4:40 Just a favour(Yunanca:Μια χάρη μόνο) 4:30 Finale(Yunanca:Φινάλε) 0:33 And I fall into tears(Yunanca:Και με παίρνουν τα κλάματα) 3:42 You will not become yesterday(Yunanca:Δε θα γίνεις χθες) 3:12 Whoever dies forgets(Yunanca:Οποιος παθαίνει ξεχνά ) 3:23 You marked me(Yunanca:Με σημάδεψες ) 3:45 Tonight the house speaks to you(Yunanca:Απόψε σου μιλάει το σπίτι ) 4:08 I am getting lost(Yunanca:Χάνομαι) 3:47 Different pair (Yunanca:Ταίρι αλλιώτικο) 3:21 In the old castle(Yunanca:Στο κάστρο το παλιό) 3:07 You always getting away from me(Yunanca:Ολο μου φεύγεις) 2:54 Authority(Yunanca:Εξουσία ) 2:27 You will be getting lost into nothing(Yunanca:Θα χάνεσαι στο τίποτα ) 3:12 Sins and agonies(Yunanca:Αμαρτίες κι αγωνίες)3:35 Like an undyed poster(Yunanca:Σαν αφίσα ξεβαμμένη )4:50 Who is bargaining my life(Yunanca:Ποιός παζαρεύει τη ζωή μου ) 3:24 The life cinema(Yunanca:Η ζωή σινεμά ) 2:49 Shall I knock to you, or leave?(Yunanca:Να σου χτυπήσω ή να φύγω) 3:12 In first person(Yunanca:Σε πρώτο πρόσωπο) 3:00 You close the door(Yunanca:Την πόρτα κλείνεις ) 2:44 Odyssey(Yunanca: Οδύσσεια ) 4:11 I sent you away one night(Yunanca:Μια νύχτα σ' έδιωξα ) 5:01 I will leave at night(Yunanca:Θα φύγω νύχτα ) 3:01 Behold, the Bridegroom is coming(Yunanca:Ιδού ο Νυμφίος) 2:06 Your wedding room(Yunanca:Τον νυμφώνα σου ) 1:32 Today is suspended(Yunanca:Σήμερον κρεμάται ) 6:41 They disrobed me(Yunanca:Εξέδυσάν με) 3:51 You, whom You wear the light as clothes(Yunanca:Σε το Αναβαλόμενον) 9:16 O my Christ amd my life, You were placed in a tomb(Yunanca:Η ζωή εν τάφω) 4:20 It is right to magnify You (Yunanca:Αξιον Εστί)3:30 All generations (Yunanca:Αι γενεαί πάσαι )4:22 Today is the day of Resurrection (Yunanca:Αναστάσεως ημέρα )4:08 Christ is risen (Yunanca:Χριστός Ανέστη)2:54 Let them laugh at us(Yunanca:Aσ' τους να μας κοροϊδεύουν) 2:51 Silent Lady(Yunanca:Αρχόντισσα σιωπηλή) 4:19 October's Girl(Yunanca:Κορίτσι του Οκτώβρη) 5:16 It's not your fault that I am traveling(Yunanca:Δε φταις εσύ που ταξιδεύω ) 4:10 Now that you leave(Yunanca:Τώρα που φεύγεις ) 2:48 Cheap years(Yunanca:Χρόνια φτηνά ) 3:52 Νights photographers(Yunanca:Νύχτες Φωτογράφοι ) 2:53 Wait for me(Yunanca:Περίμενέ με) 4:09 With the lost souls(Yunanca:Με τις χαμένες τις ψυχές ) 4:18 In which homeland do you want to go to?(Yunanca: Σε ποιά πατρίδα θες να πάς) 3:46 Drapetsona(Yunanca:Δραπετσώνα ) 3:50 Hallelujah - The Bridegroom is coming (Yunanca:Αλληλουάριον - Ιδού ο Νυμφίος έρχεται )8:22 O Lord - The sinful woman (Yunanca:Κύριε η εν πολλαίς αμαρτίαις )12:30 When the Lord was coming for His voluntary passion (Yunanca:Ερχόμενος ο Κύριος)4:09 They count the thirty silver coins - They offered me bile for food (Yunanca:Εστησαν τα τριάκοντα αργύρια - Εδωκαν εις το βρώμα μου χολήν )1:58 The Lord says this(Yunanca:Τάδε λέγει Κύριος ) 3:37 The begging of the Lord's passion (Yunanca:Των παθών του Κυρίου τας απαρχάς )4:41 Let all mortal flesh be silent(Yunanca:Σιγησάτω πάσα σάρξ ) 4:41 When Your mother was looking at You, suspended on the cross(Yunanca:Επί ξύλου βλέπουσα) 3:04 They disrobed Me(Yunanca:Εξέδυσαν με τα ιμάτιά μου ) 3:11 O my Christ and my life, You were placed in a tomb(Yunanca:Η ζωή εν τάφω ) 3:38 It is right to magnify You(Yunanca:Αξιον εστί ) 4:01 All generations(Yunanca:Αι γενεαί πάσαι) 3:38 She looked for You in the tomb(Yunanca:Εις το μνήμα σε επεζήτησεν) 3:42 The hymn of love(Yunanca:Ο ύμνος της αγάπης ) 12:14 I am looking for the cause(Yunanca:Ψάχνω το γιατί ) 4:56 Hello life(Yunanca:Γειά σου ζωή ) 3:45 My mother Greece(Yunanca:Μάνα μου Ελλάδα ) 3:00 Theories(Yunanca:Θεωρίες ) 2:53 Life is a breath(Yunanca:Μια ανάσα είναι η ζωή ) 2:37 West and East(Yunanca:Δύση και Ανατολή ) 4:28 I make songs in order to see(Yunanca:Τραγούδια κάνω για να δω ) 2:41 Like once upon a time in the city(Yunanca:Οπως κάποτε στην πόλη 3 ) 3:00 My Ayia - Sofia(Yunanca: Αγιά - Σοφιά μου) 3:37 Where to find you(Yunanca:Που να βρω ) 4:01 Oracle (Yunanca: Χρησμός )2:43 Free seas (I am looking for the cause)(Yunanca:Ελεύθερες Θάλασσες (Ψάχνω το γιατί ) 1:41 == Dış bağlantılar == Petros Gaitanos 15 Şubat 2006 tarihinde Wayback Machine sitesinde arşivlendi. İKSEV - İzmir Festivali  28 Eylül 2007 tarihinde Wayback Machine sitesinde arşivlendi. Petros Gaitanos-Tzivaeri(Cevahirim) Petros Gaitanos-ARHONTOGIOS PANTREVETE 28 Eylül 2007 tarihinde Wayback Machine sitesinde arşivlendi. Petros Gaitanos-DODEKA EVZONAKIA 28 Eylül 2007 tarihinde Wayback Machine sitesinde arşivlendi. Petros Gaitanos-STOPA KE STO XANALEO(Sto pa kai sto ksanaleo)(Sana söyledim ve tekrar söylüyorum)(Fırtına) Petros Gaitanos-STOPA KE STO XANALEO(Sto pa kai sto ksanaleo)(Sana söyledim ve tekrar söylüyorum)(Fırtına)(Video) 23 Eylül 2016 tarihinde Wayback Machine sitesinde arşivlendi.

== Dış bağlantılar == Petros Gaitanos 15 Şubat 2006 tarihinde Wayback Machine sitesinde arşivlendi. İKSEV - İzmir Festivali  28 Eylül 2007 tarihinde Wayback Machine sitesinde arşivlendi. Petros Gaitanos-DODEKA EVZONAKIA 28 Eylül 2007 tarihinde Wayback Machine sitesinde arşivlendi. items.question: Metinde sunulan bilgilere göre, Petros Gaitanos hangi tür sanatsal çalışmalarla uğraşmaktadır ve listelenen bestelerinin özellikleri nelerdir?
items.answer: Petros Gaitanos bir Yunan besteci ve şarkıcıdır. Listelenen besteleri, çoğunun orijinal Yunanca başlıkları ve belirli süreleri olan çok sayıda şarkıdır; bu da albümler içindeki müzik eserlerine odaklandığını göstermektedir.
